gp_note: Partial results (7/10 seeds). Key finding: GP results are highly seed-dependent. The reported $3,143 from exp/11-gp-tradeoff was specific to seed=42; other seeds average ~$1,600.
key_finding: PSO exhibits 2-3 attractor basins with 60% convergence to the best basin. GP is far more seed-sensitive: seed=42 produced an outlier $3,143, but most seeds yield $1,500-1,800.

analysis.conclusion: PSO is far more robust than GP. PSO mean $2,297 > BH $2,170 with low variance (std=$77). GP mean $1,506 < BH with high variance (std=$474). The reported GP 'best' of $3,143 was a seed-dependent outlier, not a reproducible finding.
